title: DJ Torterra
description: A Regional Fake-Mon designed for use in Cobblemon
body:
This was a project created in mind for use in Cobblemon, A Regional Music themed varient of my favorite Starter Torterra
- Electric/Steel typing
- Found rarely at night in villages
- Spatk Playstyle 
- Full three stage evo
- Mountable with two friends in final-stage

IN_PROGRESS
- Hover animation
- Antenna rework
- Cry fixes
- Ability rework
- Move rework
